data.name: Auth.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: An account with this email already exists.

data.name: Auth.InvalidOrExpiredRefreshToken
data.value: This refresh token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Auth.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: Auth.DisplayNameTooLong
data.value: Display name must be at most 50 characters long.

data.name: Auth.PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: Auth.PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: Auth.PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit.

data.name: Auth.PasswordRequiresSpecial
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character.

data.name: Auth.PasswordIsCommon
data.value: This password is too common. Choose a different one.

data.name: Spots.NameTooLong
data.value: Name must be at most 100 characters long.

data.name: Spots.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description must be at most 2000 characters long.

data.name: Spots.RadiusOutOfRange
data.value: Radius must be between 0 and 100 km.

data.name: Spots.NotYourSpot
data.value: You can only edit or delete spots you added.

data.name: CheckIns.TooFarFromSpot
data.value: You're too far from this spot to check in.

data.name: CheckIns.PageSizeOutOfRange
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100.

data.name: Photos.InvalidImage
data.value: The file is not a valid image.

data.name: Businesses.NameTooLong
data.value: Name must be at most 100 characters long.

data.name: Businesses.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description must be at most 2000 characters long.

data.name: Rewards.TitleTooLong
data.value: Title must be at most 100 characters long.

data.name: Rewards.DescriptionTooLong
data.value: Description must be at most 2000 characters long.

data.name: Rewards.CrystalCostOutOfRange
data.value: Crystal cost must be greater than zero.

data.name: Rewards.NotYourBusiness
data.value: You don't own the business this reward belongs to.

data.name: Rewards.InsufficientBalance
data.value: You don't have enough crystals for this reward.

data.name: Notifications.NewSpotNearbyMessage
data.value: A new spot was added nearby.

data.name: Notifications.PageSizeOutOfRange
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100.

data.name: Common.UnexpectedError
data.value: Something went wrong. Please try again.
